description: Daily audit (2026-04-22): kai/queue/daily-audit.sh defaults HYO_ROOT to $HOME/Documents/Projects/Hyo — when run by scheduled task without HYO_ROOT set it resolves to /sessions/clever-nice-cerf/Documents/Projects/Hyo (dead path), reports all 5 agents FAIL, and writes the report to an unreachable location. The scheduled-task runner at kai/queue/com.hyo.daily-audit.plist (or equivalent) must export HYO_ROOT=/Users/kai/Documents/Projects/Hyo before invoking, OR the script should fall back to its own location via dirname. Self-sabotaging audit — fix before next 22:00 MT run.
prevention: Nel audit + Sam test coverage deployed

title: generate-morning-report.sh syntax errors at lines 1242 and 1259 prevent auto-commit/push
detail: Bash error: [[: 0\n0: syntax error in expression (error token is "0"). Caused by unquoted variable that contains a newline. Script generated report and updated feed.json successfully, but bailed before commit/push. Required manual intervention by Kai (commit 20f27f1) to ship morning-report-2026-04-26 to HQ. Both website/data/feed.json AND agents/sam/website/data/feed.json mirror writes were also missed by the script — only the primary path was updated. Dual-path gate caught it on manual commit.
prevention: (1) Quote the variables on lines 1242/1259 of bin/generate-morning-report.sh and convert numeric comparison to use -gt/-lt or arithmetic context (( )). (2) Ensure the script writes feed.json to BOTH website/data/ AND agents/sam/website/data/ — currently only morning-report.json is mirrored. (3) Add a final gate that verifies git push succeeded before returning success exit code.

description: Agent cycles same assessment/action without state change (cognitive entrenchment). Detected via ring buffer fingerprint equality or null_progress counter >= 3.
prevention: bin/dead-loop-detector.py circuit breaker — wired into agent-growth.sh before execute_next_improvement(). WARN at 3/6, HARD_STOP at 5/6, ESCALATE at null_progress>=3.

description: Agent gather/synthesize step fails silently (0 entities), then overwrites previously good feed.json/newsletter.html with empty output. No alert raised until Hyo notices.
prevention: bin/content-guard.py — BLOCK if new artifact < 10% of prior bytes. Called before git commit in newsletter.sh, podcast.py, generate-morning-report.sh.

description: Agent advances ticket status (RESEARCHED → IMPLEMENTED → SHIPPED → VERIFIED) without providing required artifacts. States become theater — claimed without substance.
prevention: bin/ticket.sh transition command with proof gates. RESEARCHED needs 3+ sources, IMPLEMENTED needs commit SHA, VERIFIED needs live URL HTTP 200.
source: SE-030 post-mortem, Hyo feedback on research theater
